title: boissiera squarrosa var. glabriflora
intro: Boissiera squarrosa var. glabriflora, also known as the Boissiera squarrosa glabriflora, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae, commonly found in Australia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Boissiera squarrosa var. glabriflora can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, and are often used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
